goals.title: Implement the ATLAS v2 context root model end-to-end. Default ATLAS r...
goals.objective: Implement the ATLAS v2 context root model end-to-end. Default ATLAS root to ~/ATLAS when --root is omitted. Resolve context as user/session/ip/workflow, isolate IP files and .session data under ATLAS_ROOT/user/session, keep legacy owner/ip/workflow read compatibility, start workers in the active IP root, make backend APIs/tools/context/todo/git/perforce/jobs use the resolved IP/session roots, add UI session creation/switching, and verify with automated tests plus HTTP, Browser web UI, and Computer Use desktop UI E2E for multiple users, multiple sessions, same IP across sessions, workflow switching, chat, context command, todo command, and side panel file tree.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: start the live ATLAS server on a temporary root, create/use two users and two sessions with the same IP, switch workflows, send chat/todo/context requests through curl, and verify returned context_key/project roots plus on-disk .session files are isolated under ATLAS_ROOT/user/session/.session/ip/workflow.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/atlas-context-root-http-e2e.txt containing curl -i status lines, JSON bodies for health/session/context/todo/chat, filesystem tree excerpt, and cleanup receipt for server PID/temp root.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: open the real web UI in the in-app Browser against the live server, create/switch sessions, create IPs, switch workflows, send chat plus /context and /todo commands, and verify the side panel file tree breadcrumb/root reflects ROOT/user/session/ip rather than common_ai_agent.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/atlas-context-root-browser-e2e.md plus screenshots under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/browser/ showing session selector, workflow switch, chat response, todo/context output, and side panel root.

successCriteria.scenario: Computer use plus regression/adversarial: launch the Desktop app with no --root and with explicit --root, verify default ~/ATLAS and explicit root behavior, verify legacy owner/ip/workflow URL/session still loads, verify malformed path segments are rejected, and inspect Desktop side panel/workflow switching through OS-level UI automation.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/atlas-context-root-desktop-e2e.md plus Desktop screenshots under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/desktop/ and command transcripts for npm build/test, Python tests, malformed segment rejection, legacy compatibility, and cleanup receipt.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/atlas-context-root-model/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/atlas-context-root-model/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
